---
name: fullstack-system-skill
description: 'Use when planning or building full-stack systems with frontend, backend, database, auth, APIs, deployment, and production readiness.'
---

# Full-Stack System Skill

## Purpose
Build production-ready systems, not just isolated UI.

## Use When
- Designing end-to-end app architecture
- Wiring frontend to APIs and database flows
- Planning auth, payments, admin tools, and deployment
- Turning a feature request into a complete system

## System Thinking
Always reason through:
- Frontend
- Backend
- Database
- Auth
- Payments
- Deployment

## Core Rules
- Keep API calls out of inline UI logic
- Validate inputs before writing data
- Model data with proper relations
- Handle loading, errors, and empty states
- Design for edge cases like failure and refresh
- Keep the system modular and scalable

## Workflow
1. Map the user flow end to end.
2. Identify data structures and API boundaries.
3. Define auth and access rules.
4. Add error handling and recovery behavior.
5. Check the implementation against production requirements.

## Expected Output
- A coherent feature flow
- Clean API boundaries
- Safe database interactions
- A maintainable admin and user experience
